name: CLKGotoTagVisibility
description: Clock Goto Tag Visibility - controls the scope of clock/event goto tags
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="..." interfaceFunctionName="CLKGotoTagVisibility" blockType="c" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="clkgototagvisibility" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="CLKGotoTagVisibility">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="1" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="A"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabDouble as="integerParameters" height="0" width="0"/>
  <Array as="objectsParameters" scilabClass="ScilabList">
    <ScilabString height="1" width="1">
      <data line="0" column="0" value="A"/>
    </ScilabString>
  </Array>
  <ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabDouble as="dState" height="0" width="0"/>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: Zero ports - no inputs or outputs
Tag value 'A' is duplicated in exprs AND objectsParameters
Purely a scope-defining block - no functional behavior
blockType='c' (continuous) despite dealing with event tags
criticalRules: Place in the subsystem where the goto tag should be visible
Tag name must match CLKGOTO/CLKFROM pairs exactly
Multiple visibility blocks can define different scopes for same tag
Does NOT connect to any other blocks - sets scope by position
blockType='c' means it's evaluated in continuous context
commonUses: Limiting goto tag scope to specific subsystems
Resolving tag name conflicts between subsystems
Managing event signal visibility in hierarchical models
Creating scoped event connections without visible wires
